div.p: Session state is part of the replicated state machine, ensuring deduplication survives leader changes and is included in snapshots.

ol.li: Session State is Replicated: Part of state machine, survives leader changes because it goes through Raft consensus.
Deduplication Works Across Leaders: When leader changes, new leader has same session state → no double-execution.
Snapshots Include Sessions: After snapshot recovery, deduplication continues to work correctly.
Exactly-Once Semantics: Client retries are safe because (clientId, sequenceNumber) uniquely identifies each operation.

div.p: Session state is included in snapshots for deduplication continuity across recovery.
